source_detail: Read-only GET http://127.0.0.1:7878/api/state. The endpoint exposed project id, run ids, risk_map findings, scanned file count, high-impact tools, guard presence, approval gate presence, and verify booleans. It did not expose uploaded projects, file picker state, clone status, or real working-copy write state.
mock_todo: Real project upload, folder picker, clone, and zip import are not exposed by /api/state.
Working-copy writes are not wired in this prototype.
File span coordinates are not exposed by /api/state.
